utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present with plan name, monthly cost, and features (costs included) → acceptable. property_coverage is null → not included. travel_coverage is present with plan name, monthly cost, and features (costs included) → acceptable. additional_services is null → not included. total_budget is present with monthly and annual totals (cost breakdown present) → acceptable. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes two specific plans: EliteCare Premium Plan under health_coverage and PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel_coverage. I located these exact plan names in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, respectively, and extracted their ratings.
